COMMENT: CCW uses a CMS algorithm to identify LTCH: Using the Inpatient Claims File, identify claims where the 
3rd and 4th digits of the provider number (source variable called PRVDR_NUM) = 20, 21, 22. 

CCW creates Medicare Timeline file to identify the type of facility or level of acuity of care received by 
the beneficiary each day. Using CMS rules, CCW employs a hierarchy of claims and MDS assessment
